title: Team Sonic Racing™

notes: Perfect on max set 1920x1080 & Worked Online mode
title: Team Sonic Racing™

notes: Runs out of the box. No issues so far.
title: Team Sonic Racing™

notes: Game runs with some minor slowdowns (even with vsync off). I get about 90fps most of the time. My CPU is maxed out (with the game using about 60%) and is two generations behind the recommended CPU anyway, although the game runs without these issues on Windows. This aside, the game is fine and it is of course fully playable!
title: Team Sonic Racing™

notes:
Played offline for a few hours in Story mode, no bugs in gameplay.
However, the intro video is skipped.
title: Team Sonic Racing™

notes: Solid performance, online works, only issue is no intro video - However this seems to happen sometimes on Windows too. I think this specifically is an issue with Proton. There's probably a fix but it's really no big deal as it doesn't cause any game lockups (unlike Catherine Classic).
title: Team Sonic Racing™

notes: Game runs with near-native performance with all settings at max. Intro video doesn't play by default, but use "mf-install" to fix this (https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install), note that you DON'T need mf-installcab, the standard mf-install is enough to fix the intro cutscene. Follow the instructions on the README to install but it's essentially [WINEPREFIX="/path/to/library/folder/compatdata/78520/pfx" ./install-mf]. After that, you'll have your intro cutscene.
title: Team Sonic Racing™
